scaffold:
Step 1: Start facing north.

Step 2: Turn left 90 degrees.
North -> West

Step 3: Turn left 90 degrees.
West -> South

Step 4: Turn left 270 degrees.
Turning left 270 degrees is the same as turning right 90 degrees.
South -> West

Step 5: Turn right 180 degrees.
West -> East

Step 6: Turn left 270 degrees.
Turning left 270 degrees is the same as turning right 90 degrees.
East -> South

Step 7: Turn right 90 degrees.
South -> West

FINAL: West
wrong_scaffold:
Step 1: Start facing **north**.

Step 2: Turn left 90 degrees.  
Facing **west**.

Step 3: Turn left 90 degrees again.  
Facing **south**.

Step 4: Turn left 270 degrees.  
A 270-degree left turn is equivalent to a 90-degree right turn, so from south you would face **west**.

Step 5: Turn right 180 degrees.  
From west, a 180-degree right turn points you to **east**.

Step 6: Turn left 270 degrees.  
A 270-degree left turn is equivalent to a 90-degree right turn, so from east you would face **south**.

Step 7: Turn right 90 degrees.  
From south, turning right 90 degrees means you face **west**.

FINAL: west
compressed:
Start: N. L90 -> W. L90 -> S. L270 (= R90) -> E. R180 -> W. L270 (= R90) -> S. R90 -> W.

Final direction: West.
